name: mirrortrace-takedown-generator
title: MirrorTrace AUX — Takedown / Removal-Letter Generator
description: Auxiliary actor that closes the loop from audit to action. It reads the SELF subject's REAL detector findings (typed module_events the other MirrorTrace actors produced), CLUSTERS them by co-occurrence key (host/email-prefix/handle) the SpiderFoot-correlation way via shared/enrich/cluster-keys.js, and drafts ready-to-review removal requests: GDPR Art.17 erasure, CCPA/CPRA delete, Google 'Results about you' search de-index, a self-remediation checklist for surfaces the subject controls, and credential-rotation guidance for breach/secret leaks. Scope-gated to self/public_figure ONLY via shared/scope.js; a takedown is inherently first-person ('remove info about ME'). NO fake data: every letter is a DETERMINISTIC template filled only from real event fields with explicit [[ FILL IN ]] blanks, marked is_template:true; nothing is sent and nothing is removed automatically. No findings in -> empty plan out.
